key_risks: Hawkish June FOMC surprise given CPI reacceleration to 3.8% YoY could compress growth multiples
Oil at $92 and PPI +6% YoY may spark stagflation fears hurting high-multiple tech
Semis/tech have run hard (SMH +19% 30d); profit-taking risk into month-end
Consumer sentiment at 44.8 signals demand deterioration risk
Dollar weakness or yen intervention could disrupt cross-asset positioning

portfolio.rationale: Strong momentum, AI capex acceleration, ISM new orders rising, semiconductor sales +25% QoQ.
Tech leadership with strong earnings, AI spending forecast +47% YoY, ISM manufacturing reaccelerating.
Hedge against rising inflation (CPI 3.8%, PPI 6.0% YoY) and elevated geopolitical/oil risk.
$1.5T FY27 defense budget request, strong durable goods orders +7.9%, geopolitical tailwinds.
Strong sector momentum (+37% 30d), AI-driven cybersecurity spend forecast $86B in 2026.

portfolio_rationale: Tilt toward AI/tech beneficiaries showing accelerating fundamentals (ISM new orders 56.8, AI capex), balanced with gold hedge against sticky inflation and oil at $92. Defense provides budget-driven catalyst.
rationale_summary: Overweight AI/semis/tech where earnings momentum and capex cycles dominate, with gold and defense as inflation/geopolitical hedges into June FOMC.
